# Galletta Bros Hauling

> Family-run junk removal, pressure washing, snow removal, and moving crew based in Old Greenwich, Connecticut. Serving Greenwich, Riverside, Stamford, and Darien. Phone 203-252-0250. Open Mon-Sun 7am to 6pm.

## Quick Facts

- Business: Galletta Bros Hauling
- Type: LocalBusiness, MovingCompany, HomeAndConstructionBusiness
- Location: Old Greenwich, Connecticut, USA
- Phone: +1-203-252-0250
- Hours: Mon-Sun, 7am to 6pm
- Service area: Old Greenwich, Greenwich, Riverside, Stamford, Darien (Fairfield County)
- Services: Junk Removal, Pressure Washing, Snow Removal, Moving
- Pricing: Free on-site quotes; pricing scales with truck load (quarter, half, three-quarter, full)
- Insurance: Fully insured
- Website: https://gallettabros.com
- Yelp: https://www.yelp.com/biz/galletta-bros-hauling-old-greenwich

## Services

- [Junk Removal](https://gallettabros.com/#services): Garage cleanouts, basement cleanouts, attic cleanouts, estate cleanouts, full property cleanouts. Single-item pickup or full-house haul.
- [Pressure Washing](https://gallettabros.com/#services): Driveway, patio, siding, deck cleaning. High-pressure restorative cleaning.
- [Snow Removal](https://gallettabros.com/#services): Plowing, shoveling, salting. Residential and small commercial. Through the storm and all winter.
- [Moving](https://gallettabros.com/#services): Local moves, single items, full households.

## Trust

- [Customer reviews](https://gallettabros.com/#reviews): 5-star Yelp reviews from customers in Riverside, Greenwich, Old Greenwich.
- [Service area map](https://gallettabros.com/#areas): Visual map of the towns covered.
- [About the brothers](https://gallettabros.com/#about): Two-brother family operation rooted in Old Greenwich.

## Common Questions

- [FAQ](https://gallettabros.com/#faq): What we take, how fast we can come, pricing, insurance, snow during storms.
